note: Older ECU returns descriptive German fault-location text; keyed variant-agnostically on the exact SGBD string.

faults.Tuerkontakt FT ueber 16 min aktiv: Door contact, driver's door active over 16 min
faults.Tuerkontakt BT ueber 16 min aktiv: Door contact, passenger's door active over 16 min
faults.Tuerkontakt TH ueber 16 min aktiv: Door contact, rear door active over 16 min
faults.CS dauernd aktiv (laenger als ca. 5 sec): Crash signal permanently active (longer than approx. 5 sec)
faults.ZV-Relais: MER Kleber gegen AK: Central-locking relay: unlock motor stuck to normally-open contact
faults.ZV-Relais: MER Kleber gegen RK: Central-locking relay: unlock motor stuck to normally-closed contact
faults.ZV-Relais: MVR Kleber gegen AK: Central-locking relay: lock motor stuck to normally-open contact
faults.ZV-Relais: MVR Kleber gegen RK: Central-locking relay: lock motor stuck to normally-closed contact
faults.ZV-Relais: MZS Kleber gegen AK: Central-locking relay: double-lock motor stuck to normally-open contact
faults.ZV-Relais: MZS Kleber gegen RK: Central-locking relay: double-lock motor stuck to normally-closed contact
faults.TSH: Sicherung oder Relais defekt: Door-sill heater: fuse or relay faulty
faults.TSH: Heizwendel, Relaiskleber AK oder Di: Door-sill heater: heating element, relay stuck to normally-open contact, or diagnostic feedback
faults.TSH: RSH Kurzschluss Ansteuerleitung: Door-sill heater: heater-relay control line short circuit
faults.TSH: Sicherung RSH oder offene Ansteuerl: Door-sill heater: heater-relay fuse or open control line
